title: Premier de cordée
writer: Roger Frison-Roche, Alexandre Arnoux, Louis Daquin
actors: Irène Corday, André Le Gall, Marcel Delaître
plot: Zian Servettaz is a dedicated mountain man. His Italian-born wife Bianca does not adjust well to his mountain village in France, and to the ever life-threatening dangers presented by his mountain guiding and climbing.
